product.title: LUKITO Premium Silicone Licking Mat for Dogs & Cats, 77 Suction Cups, Slow Feeder, Boredom Reducer, Anxiety Relief, Dishwasher Safe, Food Grade
feature_bullets: 【77 Super Suctions】: The back of this licking mat is equipped with 77 high-strength suction cups, which can be well fixed on various walls or glass, refrigerators. It is a good distraction toy for pet bathing grooming and dog nail trimming.

【Slow Feeder Mat for Dogs & Cats】: Four different textured surfaces design is prefect for spreadable treats, such as cream cheese, yoghurt, peanut butter and so on. It is a peanut butter mat for dogs to extend the feeding time and aid digestion. This lick mat is an ideal size for cats, puppies, small meduim and large dogs.

【Reduces anxiety, boredom and destructive behavior】: The lick pads help calm pets. It is a boredom buster for dog to suppress destructive behavio and relieves anxiety at home alone. This dog treat lick mat is great for stressful times such vet visits, bath time, nail clipping, injury recovery as well as thunderstorms and fireworks.
【Food grade silicone】 : Premium food grade silicone material, very durable and tough, safe for your pets.
【Dish-Washer & Freezer safe 】: It is dish-washer safe, and can be hand-washed in warm soapy water; and it is also freezer safe.

local.title: Suction cups stop working after few uses
local.text: 2024 UPDATE: Updating to 5 stars because my dog and I love these things. I think it seemed like the suction was gone at first because if you freeze the pad and it freezes in a weird shape the suction isn’t great. But freeze it completely flat and no problem. You don’t even have to freeze the treats on the pad, it just makes for a longer licky-session for the dog.I love that this comes with two pads, each has 4 different textures, comes with a spatula/scraper, and is so easy to clean. I usually hand wash but have put them in the dishwasher. My dog gets very excited when he hears “licky-pad time”!I usually put a couple treat types on at once and freeze. After trial and error, we’ve landed at our favorites being beef or turkey baby food and spray cheese (I tried the Kong cheese at first but it’s expensive, and figured he’s getting so little of the cheese it doesn’t matter if it’s the cheap grocery store kind). Canned pumpkin also worked but he wasn’t as gung-ho for it.Just rinse it off when done to get the “chunks” out, then run over the pad with some dish soap and dish brush. 2 minutes max. Let the dog lick the scraper clean before washing it. If I don’t feel like washing it I rinse and put in the dishwasher, and use the second pad. The suction stays strong. It really sucks to my sink bottom when I’m washing it!2023: Really liked the product at first. Dog likes it, easy to use and clean. But after just a few uses and hand washing the suction cups didn’t work any more so now when he tries to lick the mat it slides all over the floor.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on October 14, 2023

local.title: Very helpful tool!
local.text: These licking mats are wonderful for my puppies bath times. Slather with peanut butter and stick to the side of the tub, my pups are too busy trying to get the peanut butter to wiggle and fight me through the bath. Also easy to clean any residual (thete usually isn't much with my boys) with dish soap and a soft dish brush. Can also be stuck to the inside walls of their crates if I must leave them for a few hours. Very helpful tool for our household!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 12, 2026

local.title: Good for entertaining your pets. Easily cleaned.
local.text: My dogs love these! I love them! Keeps them entertained for about 45 minutes to an hour. Easily stays on the floor in place but also easily removable. Easy to clean and did go through the dishwasher. Only thing, my golden retriever and black lab have chewed holes in them. I will buy again, just wish they were a little more sturdy. Gave 4 stars for how easy it was for my dogs to chew holes in them.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 18, 2026

local.title: Good buy
local.text: Quantity: I did not think I needed three, but multiples are nice for backups. I fill all three (peanut butter and canned pumpkin) and keep them in the freezer ready to go. Suction cups: nice, but the dog quickly pulls up the mat and moves it. It did stick to a smooth shower stall / cabinet, but it did not stay on these vertical surfaces very long. Size: good for my 45 pound puppy. He has not destroyed them and they are a valuable part of our daily routine helping to keep him occupied so I can have a couple minute break. Cleaning: in dishwasher (bottom rack even) and, so far, they have held up, but doe not get 100% of peanut butter off. So I use a toothbrush and then it cleans up easily. Overall good quality, easy to use.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on November 25, 2025

local.title: Freeze me for a real treat
local.text: These lick mats are a hit with my 3 dogs who are all healthy and range from 40-70 lbs. First round, I spread some peanut butter on with the included silicon spatula and immediately gave to my dogs. It only took them a few minutes to get that up. I quickly learned that sticking the coated mats in the freezer for a few is really where it's at! Entertained my pups for at least 30 minutes and they easily settled after. Some mentioned it being difficult to clean, however, if you let them run under hot water and then soak for a bit, you can easily get the food out of all nooks and crannies. Simple as it gets to set up as the suction cups on the bottom are strong and hold the mats in place. I stick them to the floor for my shorter dogs and to the side of a dresser for my taller dog. So far we've tried peanut butter, yogurt, and applesauce with a drop or 2 of honey. We'll be getting lots of use out of these, just wish I had ordered more!
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on January 20, 2026

local.title: Not as big as expected. Fell apart after 2 weeks
local.text: These work great for my puppies. I got the large and they were a little smaller than expected I was hoping for them to be big enough to grow with them, but I don’t think they’ll be able to use them once they’re full grown dogs, but they’re perfect for puppies. They are pretty shallow so they don’t really fit much puppy kibble or anything larger than that but are great for wet food or pumpkin. I freeze mine and it takes them about 20 minutes to finish.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 8, 2026

local.title: Quality product
local.text: These work fantastic! Dishwasher cleaned them up great. I will get more of these.
local.date: Reviewed in the United States on February 20, 2026

local.text: My pet love this lightweight ease to use functions just fine and easy to clean slip resistant is good and the pet can enjoy its treats do recommend your pet will love it too very affordable

global.title: Don't stick after few washes
global.text: Liked these at first but now they won't stick to glass anymore so are useless. Have used them only a handful of times.

global.text: Concept is great but it doesn’t stick anymore except for the sink when you’re trying to wash them

global.title: Great for little furry babies
global.text: Bought this on behalf of my colleague and she loves it. Her puppy enjoys eating from it too.

global.title: My girls will now let me brush them!
global.text: Fantastic! My girls absolutely love it. I have two ragdolls who need constant brushing and they actually let me now.

global.title: A Game-Changer for Pet Anxiety / Keeping your Pet Busy
global.text: I recently purchased the Lick Mat for Dogs & Cats 2 Pack with Suction Cups, and it's been a lifesaver for my anxious furry friend! The product's design and functionality have exceeded my expectations, providing my pet with a calming and engaging experience.Key Features:Effective Anxiety Relief: The lick mat's unique design and suction cups keep my pet occupied, reducing anxiety and stress.Easy to Clean: The mat is dishwasher safe, making maintenance a breeze.Versatile: Suitable for dogs and cats, perfect for multi-pet households.Durable: Withstands regular use and cleaning.My Experience:My pet was initially hesitant but soon became engrossed in the mat's soothing pattern. The suction cups ensure it stays in place, preventing slipping or movement. The mat's size is perfect for my pet's favorite relaxation spots.Pros and Cons:Pros:Reduces anxiety and stressEasy to clean and maintainVersatile for dogs and catsDurable constructionCons:None noted
